titleStmt.title: SII 36.277: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 277. (A.R. No. 277 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: (Tulā, śu, 1, Sunday, Sōdhi (Svāthi) = A.D. 1258, September 29, Sunday.)

Purchase of 3 vēlis of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi for a consideration of 200 paṇams by the temple trustees (Tānattār) in a public auction from a woman, Piḷḷai Maṟaipēr Manikkam. The woman could not pay the fine imposed by her supervisor (?) since she has no funds and therefore she was willing to sell the kāṇi. There was nobody to purchase her kāṇi and even the sabhā declined to buy it. Thereupon the Nāṭṭār and the ūrār advised the Tāṉattār of the temple to purchase the land in public auction, which the latter complied with. They sold an ornament for 200 paṇam and with that money the kāṇi was purchased.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vīrapāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10
pattāvatu tulā nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Āmūṟ koṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭṭut tiruiṭavantaiāṉa Acurar kulakāla nallūr Emperumāṉ A
ṭiyāril Āyiravar māṇikkattiṉ makaḷ nācci Āṉa piḷḷai maṟaiper māṇikkattukku Ivvūr Ūravar Ivūr capaiyā
r pakkal koṇṭuṭaiya kāṇiāy Ivaḷukku viṟṟu Ivaḷ koṇṭuṭaiya kāṇi Ivaḷai Uṭaiyār vīrapāṇṭiya
k kāliṅkarāyar teṇṭam niccayitta paṇattukku Ivaḷ koḷvīruḷīroveṉṟu kūṟa koḷḷuvārillātapaṭiyāle nā
ṭṭārum Ūravarum mutaliyāṉa nīṅkaḷe koḷḷakkaṭaviyoṉa Eṉṟu capaiyāraic colla Ivarkaḷum Eṅkaḷukku koḷḷa mu
talillai Eṉṟu colla Uṅkaḷukku mutalillai Ākil tirunāmattukkāṇi Ākak koḷḷuṅkoḷ Eṉṟu tāṉattārkku nāṭṭā
rum Ūrārum collukaiāle tāṉam Āka Iruntu tiruāparaṇattai viṟṟu capaiyār Ūravaṟkku viṟṟa cātaṉappaṭi
paṇa Irunūṟum kuṭuttu tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka koṇṭa nilam mūṉṟu veliyum koṇṭom tāṉattārom paṇiyāl Ivai
kovil kaṇakku nitta kalliyāṇappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 36.277 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
